proposed_artifacts.content:
# Bundle 17 Source Location Report

**Task:** bundle-17-locate-sources
**Stage:** S3
**Matter:** napier-accommodation-arrears

## Result
No source documents were provided in the work order. The evidence manifest and source materials sections are empty. Without a bundle index, document list, or any source identifiers, it is not possible to locate or attach source documents for Bundle 17.

## Recommended Next Steps
1. Obtain a bundle index or document inventory for Bundle 17 from the matter record.
2. Upload the bundle index as a source or artifact so that individual documents can be identified.
3. Re-submit a task with the bundle index or specific source IDs to enable document retrieval.
proposed_artifacts.title: Bundle 17 Source Location Report
